title: Beyond One-Size-Fits-All: Multi-Agent Framework for Persona-Based Biomedical Summarization
venue: Proceedings of the Third Workshop on Patient-Oriented Language Processing (CL4Health), 2026
abstract: A multi-agent framework for persona-based biomedical summarization that goes beyond one-size-fits-all approaches, generating tailored summaries for clinicians, policymakers, patients, and students using specialized agents.

title: PERCS: Persona-Guided Controllable Biomedical Summarization Dataset
abstract: PERCS introduces a novel dataset of biomedical abstracts paired with persona-tailored summaries for four audiences: clinicians, policymakers, patients, and students.

title: AlignTune: Modular Toolkit for Post-Training Alignment of Large Language Models
abstract: AlignTune is a modular post-training alignment toolkit for reasoning-focused LLMs integrating SFT and RLHF-style methods (GRPO, PPO, IFT, DPO) with composable reward functions and structured reward-model training.

title: Detecting the Machine: A Comprehensive Benchmark of AI-Generated Text Detectors Across Architectures, Domains, and Adversarial Conditions
abstract: A comprehensive benchmark systematically evaluating detection approaches for machine-generated text across HC3 and ELI5 corpora, spanning fine-tuned transformers, stylometric hybrids, perplexity-based detectors, and LLM-as-detector prompting under zero-shot and adversarial conditions.
